label: CDISC Protocol Representation Model
title: PRM | CDISC
text: The CDISC Protocol Representation Model provides a standard for planning and designing a research protocol. It focuses on study characteristics including study design, eligibility criteria, and requirements from ClinicalTrials.gov, WHO, and EudraCT registries. PRM also supports automation of CRF creation and EHR configuration.

sections.heading: Protocol Representation Model
sections.text: PRM focuses on study design, eligibility criteria, and clinical-trial registry requirements.

sections.heading: Automation
sections.text: PRM assists in automating CRF creation and EHR configuration for clinical research and data sharing.

citation_spans.quoted_text: PRM focuses on study design, eligibility criteria, and requirements from clinical-trial registries.
